title: Automatische Ablaeufe erstellen

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing a simple workflow process directly on a white background (no containing box or frame). A horizontal sequence of three circular icons connected by thin arrow lines (1px, #8A8F98): first circle contains a lightning bolt icon in #118AB2 (Ausloeser), second circle contains a gear icon in #FFD166 (Verarbeitung), third circle contains a document-out icon in #06D6A0 (Ergebnis). Each circle has a subtle 1px border in #E5E7EB. Below the sequence, a small circular refresh/loop arrow in #118AB2 suggesting a repeating routine. A small pill badge reading 'Routine' in 11px semibold #073B4C with a #FFD166 left dot, border-radius 999px. The illustration conveys: Erstelle wiederkehrende Ablaeufe und Routinen, die Claude regelmaessig fuer dich erledigt.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos, terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
